title: mailagent configuration
description: Configuration for mailagent, a multi-inbox workflow automation agent for docker-mailserver.

providers.description: Named LLM provider configurations. Workflows and inbox defaults reference these names.

inboxes.description: Inbox definitions. Each inbox has its own workflow list, credentials, and optional provider overrides.

envOrString.description: Any string, including env interpolation syntax like ${VAR_NAME} or ${VAR_NAME:-default}.

providerConfig.description: Single provider configuration. The object key under providers is the provider name referenced elsewhere.

model.description: Model identifier for the selected provider, for example gpt-4o or claude-sonnet-4-20250514.

base_url.description: Optional base URL override, useful for OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

timeout.description: HTTP timeout in seconds for this provider. Defaults to settings.llm_timeout_seconds.

retries.description: Retry count for provider calls on timeout or 5xx response.

blocklist.description: Blocklist rules for senders and headers. Matching emails are never auto-replied.

from_patterns.description: Case-insensitive substring patterns matched against sender email, for example noreply@.

headers.description: Header names or literal header fragments to block, for example List-Unsubscribe or Precedence: bulk.

defaults.description: Global defaults inherited by each inbox unless overridden.

classify_provider.description: Name of provider under providers used for classification by default.

reply_provider.description: Name of provider under providers used for reply generation by default.

system_prompt.description: Global system prompt prepended to all LLM calls. Inbox/workflow prompts are appended as context.
system_prompt.default: You are a helpful email assistant.

credentials.description: Per-inbox authentication details for sending replies and IMAP updates.

keywordMatch.description: Keyword fallback matching on subject + body (case-insensitive). Use any, all, or both.

any.description: OR condition: at least one keyword must appear.

all.description: AND condition: every keyword must appear.

workflowMatch.description: Matching rule for a workflow. intent is used by LLM classification; keywords are fallback rules.

intent.description: Natural language intent description. Use intent: default for the catch-all workflow.

workflowAction.description: Action to execute when a workflow matches.

prompt.description: Prompt used for generated reply text. Required for type: reply and for notify with also_reply true.

url.description: Webhook URL for type: webhook action.

method.description: HTTP method for type: webhook action.

headers.description: Additional headers for webhook action. Values can use ${ENV} interpolation.

payload.description: JSON payload for webhook action. Supports templates like {{from}}, {{subject}}, {{body_truncated}}.

also_reply.description: For notify action, also generate and send a reply.

also_webhook.description: For reply action, also call webhook_url after reply generation/sending.

webhook_url.description: Webhook URL used when action.type is reply and also_webhook is true.

workflow.description: Single workflow evaluated in order. First matching workflow wins. Place fallback last.

name.description: Unique workflow name within an inbox.

inbox.description: Inbox-specific settings, credentials, and workflow list.

name.description: Display name for this inbox, e.g. 'Jane Doe'. Used as the From name when sending replies.

classify_provider.description: Optional override of defaults.classify_provider for this inbox.

reply_provider.description: Optional override of defaults.reply_provider for this inbox.

system_prompt.description: Inbox-specific system prompt appended to defaults.system_prompt.

workflows.description: Ordered workflow list for this inbox. Include a fallback workflow last using match.intent: default.

catch_up_on_start.description: Process existing unhandled files from Maildir/new on startup.

debounce_ms.description: Delay after inotify event before reading file, to avoid partial writes.

classify_body_limit.description: Maximum body characters sent to LLM during classification.

reply_body_limit.description: Maximum body characters sent to LLM during reply generation.

llm_retries.description: Default retry count for provider calls if provider-specific retries are not set.

llm_timeout_seconds.description: Default timeout for provider HTTP requests in seconds if provider-specific timeout is not set.

data_dir.description: Directory for state files and persistent runtime data.

mail_host.description: SMTP/IMAP hostname used when sending replies and syncing Sent/Answered flags.

max_thread_replies.description: Maximum number of mailagent replies per email thread. 0 means never reply to thread continuations.

thread_context_limit.description: Maximum characters of thread history included in reply prompts.

thread_history_max.description: Maximum number of prior messages to fetch via IMAP for thread context.
